inputs.label: Cohesion (c)
inputs.businessContext: Soil cohesion intercept, typically from 0 for sands to 150 kPa for hard clay.

businessContext_i18n.en: Soil cohesion intercept, typically from 0 for sands to 150 kPa for hard clay.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Zemin kohezyon kesme dayanımı, kumlar için 0'dan sert kil için 150 kPa'a kadar.

inputs.label: Angle of Internal Friction (φ)
inputs.businessContext: Effective friction angle of soil. Common range 20-45°.

businessContext_i18n.en: Effective friction angle of soil. Common range 20-45°.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Zeminin efektif sürtünme açısı. Yaygın aralık 20-45°.

inputs.label: Unit Weight of Soil (γ)
inputs.businessContext: From 14 kN/m³ for soft clays to 22 kN/m³ for dense sand/gravel.

businessContext_i18n.en: From 14 kN/m³ for soft clays to 22 kN/m³ for dense sand/gravel.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yumuşak killer için 14 kN/m³'ten yoğun kum/çakıl için 22 kN/m³'e kadar.

inputs.label: Depth of Foundation (Df)
inputs.businessContext: Depth of footing base below ground surface.

businessContext_i18n.en: Depth of footing base below ground surface.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Temel tabanının zemin yüzeyinin altındaki derinliği.

inputs.label: Width of Foundation (B)
inputs.businessContext: Width of continuous strip footing, or equivalent diameter of circular footing.

businessContext_i18n.en: Width of continuous strip footing, or equivalent diameter of circular footing.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Sürekli şerit temelin genişliği veya dairesel temelin eşdeğer çapı.

inputs.label: Safety Factor (FS)
inputs.businessContext: Factor of safety typically 2.5–4 for permanent structures.

businessContext_i18n.en: Factor of safety typically 2.5–4 for permanent structures.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kalıcı yapılar için tipik olarak 2,5–4 arası güvenlik faktörü.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
